race.name: Tromsø Skimaraton
race.tagline: Forty-two kilometers above the Arctic treeline — marathon skiing under the northern lights latitude.

climate.description: Tromsø sits at 69°N, well above the Arctic Circle. Spring conditions in April bring long daylight hours but cold temperatures. Maritime influence moderates extremes but brings variable weather.
challenges: Arctic wind exposure above the treeline
Rapidly changing weather at high latitude
Wind chill can be severe on exposed plateaus
Late-season spring sun can soften snow surfaces

course.primary: 42km course through the mountains above Tromsø, much of it above the treeline. Dramatic Arctic scenery with fjord views and exposed mountain terrain requiring fitness and respect for conditions.
features: Significant portions above the Arctic treeline
Panoramic views of fjords and Arctic peaks
One of the northernmost ski marathons in the world
Exposed mountain terrain demanding weather preparedness

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Outstanding Arctic scenery and reliable snow, but remote location limits field size and international accessibility. A true adventure race.

history.summary: The Tromsø Skimaraton is a ski marathon held in the mountains above Tromsø in Arctic Norway. One of the northernmost organized ski marathons in the world, it takes skiers through dramatic above-treeline terrain with views across the fjords and Arctic peaks of northern Troms.
notable_facts: One of the northernmost ski marathons in the world at 69°N
Course runs largely above the Arctic treeline
Held in April when Tromsø has nearly 24 hours of daylight
Views across Arctic fjords and the Lyngen Alps

youtube_data.search_query: Tromsø Skimaraton cross country ski race Tromsø area

videos.title: Sprint race Men - Tromsø #SkimoWC23
videos.description:
The main protagonists of the Sprint races of the past seasons, Arno Lietha and Oriol Cardona Coll, proved that they are just the best in this discipline. The two great rivals made it to the finals, and Lietha won ahead of the Spanish Sprint specialist by half of a ski.

Lietha had an exceptional season. He won five out of six Sprints and defended the small Globe for this discipline.

videos.title: Tromsø Ski marathon with Martin Korsner | SkatePro.com
videos.description:
Martin attended this year's ski marathon in Tromsø, and he made a little vlog about his experience. He shared some tips and tell you a bit about his preparation and evaluation of the race. 

Remember to like and subscribe. 
Got any questions? Please comment and we will reply within a few days.

videos.title: Kayaking in Tromsø
videos.description:
Experience the sea in an intense and exciting way. Together with your experienced guide, you paddle in the waters off the coast of Tromsø with the mountains forming a stunning backdrop. A great way to silently travel through these pristine waters and to get close to the marine wildlife. We use stable, double, sea kayaks and no paddling experience is needed to join this excursion. The guide will give you instructions and support you along the way.

Our Original Norwegian Coastal Express voyage is your pure and unfiltered escape to the charming everyday life of the Norwegian coast. Come join us on an iconic journey: 

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Hurtigruten/  
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hurtigruten/
Website: https://global.hurtigruten.com/destinations/norway/
